feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting Error: Parameterized views can't be used with sqlDialect ‘sqlite’
entry.content:
When I run cds watch --profile hybrid on my CAPM project the following error is popping up

Error: Parameterized views can't be used with sqlDialect ‘sqlite’

But the cds deploy --to hana works perfectly fine and all the artifacts are deployed. I am using HANA for db side. Below is the package.json for the project

{ "name": "xxxxxx", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "A simple CAP project.", "type": "module", "dependencies": { "@cap-js-community/odata-v2-adapter": "^1.15.10", "@cap-js/hana": "^2", "@sap/cds": "^9", "@sap/xssec": "^4", "exceljs": "^4.4.0" }, "devDependencies": { "@sap/cds-dk": "^9" }, "scripts": { "start": "cds-serve" }, "private": true, "cds": { "requires": { "[production]": { "auth": "xsuaa" }, "db": { "kind": "hana" } } } }

entry.title: US11 region CF DB URL unreachable when redirected from BAS
entry.content:
The issue is related to the BAS located in subaccount of US west (OR) region.

"a HANA Cloud orchestration endpoint in Cloud Foundry (cf-us11)"

This URL seems to return DNS_PROBE_FINISHED_NXDOMAIN error. This URL comes when you try to open SAP HANA database explorer from the SAP HANA projects section (in the bottom left) of your Business application studio. This happens only with the us11 region. When you replace us11 with us10 or any other for an instance the database explorer works and you can see your database containers added.

Because of this issue, it is showing no deployed artifacts when you try to create a new SAP HANA artifact within the CAPM project. For instance, in hdbcalculationview when you try to add source in projection node the search list is empty because it is not able to fetch the artifact list.

The cds deploy works and the binding is also there to the db container.

entry.title: documentary batch
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please help to activate documentary batch in sap hana i want to set up documentary batch for production order and vendor goods recipet integration with EWM.
for this i did the configuration activate the documentary batch , add material type FERT , ROH, HALB.
set up the manual entry process 01,04,06 with 1 entry obligatory and quantity check with warning.
For test this i created the scenario like create the production order released but in component no option showing for documentary batch same for po order .
while MIGO confirmation of GR also not showing batch to enter manually .
is there any step which i missing or what setps i need to follow to complete this documentary batch set up.

production order


PO

Regards,
Arturo

entry.title: SAP SD Consultant role (OTC, S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hello,
I am currently working in SAP SD as a Master Data specialist (customer data, pricing conditions, etc.), and I would like to transition into a functional SAP SD Consultant role (OTC, S/4HANA).

What practical skills am I still missing to be project-ready (customizing, pricing, FI/MM integration, debugging, etc.)?

Also, do you have any concrete advice or hands-on scenarios I could practice to make this transition more efficiently?

entry.title: Quartz Theme Icons
entry.content:
Hello, 

I tried using Quartz Theme, but there are no icons showing, only rectangles appear instead.

Can somebody help me with this please? Thanks

entry.title: Documentry batch
entry.content:
Hello Team,

i need to set up Documentry btach in sap activate the same ,also maintain against the material type , process manual.

While testing production order and procurement PO doc batch not option showing please help to us how to get into 
testing case . i created production order and PO also not getting Documentary batch .

please help 

regards,
Arturo

entry.title: Can We Build Live Insights Using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud Within 15 Days?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My name is E Pranith Kumar, and I am a fresher. My team and I are eager to take up a meaningful challenge and deliver a strong outcome within a short timeline.

We are exploring the possibility of building live insights using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). I would like to understand:

  • Is it feasible to build live analytical insights using CDS Views and SAC within 15 days?
  • If yes, what are the key prerequisites (system setup, authorizations, versions, and connectivity)?
  • Which T-codes/tools are typically used for:
    • Creating and exposing CDS Views
    • Enabling live connectivity to SAC
    • Authorization and data access

We have been provided with a few use cases (attached below). Since we are new to this domain, your guidance would be extremely helpful:

  • Which use case would be best suited for a short timeline?
  • Which one offers the best feature scope and business impact?
  • What SAP modules are typically involved for the recommended use case?
  • What type of system access or roles would be required to implement it?

Additionally, if possible, could you please recommend any learning resources or documentation that would help us research, learn, and implement this effectively?

Although we are new to CDS Views and SAC, we are highly motivated and ready to put in the effort. With your guidance, we are confident we can deliver meaningful insights.

Thank you very much for your time and support. I truly appreciate any direction you can provide.

Best regards,
E Pranith Kumar

entry.title: CVSS 9.9 Auth Bypass in SAP BW/BPC — Patch or Mitigate Now (SAP Note 3719353)
entry.content:
Hi All,

Following is the  security disclosure, I’ve summarized the critical vulnerability affecting our SAP landscapes. Unlike standard SQL injections, this is an Authorization Bypass that allows SQL execution through specific upload tools.

Vulnerability Detail: CVE-2026-27681 (SAP Note 3719353)

  • CVSS Score: 9.9 (Critical)
  • Nature of Risk: Authenticated users can bypass authorization checks within specific ABAP upload tools in SAP BPC and BW. This allows for the execution of arbitrary SQL statements, potentially leading to full database compromise (Read/Write/Delete).

Affected Components & Versions:

  • HANABPC: 810
  • BPC4HANA: 300
  • SAP_BW: 750 through 816

Required Action Plan:

  1. Permanent Fix (Priority: High)We need to apply the corrections from SAP Note 3719353 to deactivate the vulnerable code. Please prioritize the following Support Packages for our upcoming maintenance window:
  • SAPK-75035INSAPBW
  • SAPK-81019INHANABPC
  • SAPK-30014INBPC4HANA
  1. Immediate Mitigation (Interim)Until patching is complete, we should immediately restrict the S_GUI authorization object. Specifically, revoking Activity 60 (Upload) from standard end-user roles will block the attack vector by disabling the necessary upload functionality.

Thanks & Regards

HarshaTeja

entry.title: Issue with MATDOC - DMBTR_STOCK Value - SE16N vs HANA DB
entry.content:
I am reporting a data inconsistency from TSQ (Quality system) between the SAP GUI SE16N display and our data visualization in SAP HANA DB regarding material 10000008566 whereas material 20000008909 values are display as expected in SAP HANA DB.


There is a 10x scaling discrepancy in the currency values for the field DMBTR_STOCK (Amount in LC w/ Stock Quantity) in SAP HANA Database.

  • SAP SE16N View: The value displays as 4.032,425.
  • Data Visualization/Raw MATDOC in SAP HANA DB: The value is appearing as 40,324.25 but actually it should be 4,032.425

entry.title: DATABASE SIZE growing fast need to reduce unwanted data
entry.content:
Dear Support,

 

current DB is 330GB approx and we need to reduce some space where arcival can be consider meantime what housekeeping activity we should perform to reduce unuse space.

entry.title: SQL Error in HANA Studio Seems to be Cached
entry.content:
We are trying to analyze root cause of an an error in XSJS code when building a large sql query. We are able to replicate a similar error in HANA Studio. However, after the SQL query fails in HANA Studio with “could not split statements; sql console content is too large" error, if we try to run a much smaller query in the sql console it still fails. It seems the error is cached. 

Please help us answer these questions:

  1. Why does the error remains even in HANA Studio sql console when the cause of the error is addressed?
  2. Also, does the sql statement built in xsjs (classic) have the same length limitation as in sql console?

entry.title: Logging table SAPWSD./1CADMC/00000262 in source system ECQ is very large
entry.content:
hi SAP,

Logging table SAPWSD./1CADMC/00000262 in source system ECQ is very large, " critical objects in 2 billion record limit " 

So we were checking as this is not an application table and is a SLT related Logging table So what's the best practice to reduce its growth ? is it table paritioning ? or is it reloading the table again ?

Please confirm how we proceed to fix this ?

entry.title: HANA Cockpit retention not deleting old SYSTEMDB backup generations although log_mode is normal
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am testing HANA Cockpit backup retention for SYSTEMDB@HSD and would like to clarify if the behavior I am seeing is expected.

Configuration:

  • Backup destination: File
  • Backup path: /hana/shared/HSD/HDB00/backup/data/SYSTEMDB/
  • Daily complete data backup: around 02:00 AM
  • Automatically Delete Backup Generations: Yes
  • Deletion option: Remove from backup catalog and delete physically from file system
  • Retain Backup Generations Younger Than: 1 day
  • Minimum No. of Retained Backup Generations: 1
  • Start Daily Automatic Deletion: 9:00 PM UTC
  • Assigned Database User: SYSTEM
  • log_mode = normal

On the morning of Apr 28, I still saw these complete data backup generations in both the backup catalog and file system:

2026-04-26 02:00
2026-04-27 02:00
2026-04-28 02:00

However, when I checked again on Apr 29, the Apr 26 backup generation had been deleted, and the remaining backup files were:

2026-04-27 02:00
2026-04-28 02:00
2026-04-29 02:00

So the retention policy seems to be working, but not exactly as I initially expected.

My questions are:

  1. Is this behavior expected for Retain Backup Generations Younger Than = 1 day?
  2. Does HANA Cockpit retention evaluate and delete old backup generations only once per daily scheduler run, instead of deleting them immediately when they become older than 1 day?
  3. Why would the Apr 26 generation still exist on Apr 28 but be deleted on Apr 29?
  4. Is the correct interpretation that HANA deletes complete backup generations based on the scheduler run and generation eligibility, not simply based on the file date?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Configuration parameter [execution]/default_statement_concurrency_limit set to unsupported value.
entry.content:
Hello,

   I found the following warning message in the DBA cockpit.

      Configuration parameter [execution]/default_statement_concurrency_limit set to unsupported value.

   Please check and fix it.

entry.title: Change fields in AS01 when creaing multiple assets
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I run AS01 and enter the number of Assets I want to create based on the asset calss. When I now enter 2 or more number of similar assets I cen choose maintain to manuelly change some fields per Asset which should be differnt per Asset.

As of now I just have the fields "Description", "Inventory no.", "Company Code", "Cost Center", "Ev.1" and "Ev.2".

I want some more fields where I can enter different information per new assed whcih are not similar to the first one. Where in Customizing can I find this?

Do you have any suggestions?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: System Time different in system.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In T-Code: STZAC we can see that System time is set to UST which we would likt to change to CET.

  • OS-Level Time Zone is set to CET.

Question:

  1. What is the impact if we change the Time Zone to CET using T-Code STZAC.
  2. Do this have any effect of the functionality.
  3. Do we need to restart the system.

Please check attached document.

entry.title: Can’t save siderbar layout in FBL1H
entry.content:
Hi , SAP expert

Issue: Fail to save siderbar layout in FBL1H

Please check below screen shots in this attachment & confirm 2 things

  1.  in manage siderbar layout, there is none existing even we choose /default already?
  2. Program fail to save those fields in siderbar layout

    Step1- run FBL1H with layout- /default

     

    Step2- Manage siderbar layout

     


     

     

    Question:
    Why in manage siderbar layout, there is none existing even we choose /default already.

    Step3 – change layout and add those fields to left

     

     

    Step 4-save, a flash showed but Nothing saved, when going back and click manage siderbar layout again, there is nothing saved.

entry.title: SXI_MONITOR - still awaiting acknowledgment
entry.content:
Hi,

I use SXI_MONITOR to check xml message status, there is a few Ack. Status with "Still Awaiting Acknowledgment".
What do I need to check further regarding this?

thank for help.

Regards

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Global Consistency Check Run
entry.content:
We are getting the recommendation for the scheduling of the consistency check runs is not in agreement with SAP's recommendations in the EWA report. We have scheduled the consistency check job in DB13 and in the logs showing as no consistencies found but still we are getting the recommendation. Below are all the details of recommendation and consistency check job which we scheduled.

Please help me other than SAP where we need to schedule the Global Consistency Check Run

Below is the recommendation we are getting in EWA report

 

 

We have scheduled the consistency check job in SAP level in DB13

 

Job log

entry.title: modify designation
entry.content:
Hello

i'm working on the course S45250 Consumption-Based Planning and Forecasting in SAP S/4HANA. In the chapter 6 exercice 5.

I must modify the quantity from a Purchase Requisition. When i try to do it, i have an error message which is :" 

No designation in FR. Complete the article."

I did some research and to complete the article. I  access to the basic data view 1.  But in the basic data view 1, it's impossible to modify the article designation

Does anybody knows how to do it?

Thank you in advance.
